entities.name: VIRUS INDUCED GENE SILENCING (VIGS)
entities.description: An effective technology that exploits an antiviral defense mechanism in plants for transient gene silencing and characterizing plant gene functions

entities.name: PLANTS
entities.description: The host organisms in which VIGS is applied to study gene function

entities.name: ANTIVIRAL DEFENSE MECHANISM
entities.description: The biological process in plants that VIGS exploits to achieve gene silencing

entities.name: PLANT GENES
entities.description: The genetic sequences in plants whose functions are characterized using VIGS

entities.name: VIRAL VECTOR
entities.description: A recombinant virus engineered to carry fragments of host genes for silencing

entities.name: VIRUS INFECTION
entities.description: The process of introducing the viral vector into the plant host to trigger the defense mechanism

entities.name: LOSS OF FUNCTION PHENOTYPE
entities.description: The observable characteristic resulting from the silencing of a target gene, used to identify the gene's function

entities.name: AGROBACTERIUM TUMEFACIENS
entities.description: A bacterium used to mediate the transient expression of the VIGS vector in plant cells

entities.name: TRANSIENT EXPRESSION
entities.description: A method of introducing the VIGS vector into plant cells via Agrobacterium tumefaciens

entities.name: IN VITRO TRANSCRIBED RNA INOCULATION
entities.description: A method of introducing the VIGS vector into plant cells

entities.name: DIRECT DNA INOCULATION
entities.description: A method of introducing the VIGS vector into plant cells

entities.name: RNA DEPENDENT RNA POLYMERASE
entities.description: An enzyme that amplifies the target gene and viral RNA to generate dsRNA molecules

entities.name: DSRNA MOLECULES
entities.description: Triggering molecules of post transcriptional gene silencing generated by RNA dependent RNA polymerase

entities.name: POST TRANSCRIPTIONAL GENE SILENCING
entities.description: The biological process triggered by dsRNA molecules to suppress gene expression

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL GENOMICS STUDIES
entities.description: The broader field of research that utilizes VIGS as a reverse genetics tool
